Remediation_Action: Escalate to Data Steward. Attempt back-fill from source permit system. If unavailable, flag STATUS='F'.

Description: HOUSING_STARTS must be >= 0. Negative values are physically impossible.
Remediation_Action: Root cause: manual data entry error in source permit system. Remediation: take absolute value and flag record for steward review.

Description: AVERAGE_PRICE_CAD must not be NULL on non-suppressed records.
Remediation_Action: Escalate to Data Steward. Re-run price survey aggregation for affected period/geography.

Description: AVERAGE_PRICE_CAD must be > 0. Negative prices are invalid.
Remediation_Action: Root cause: sign-flip error during CPI adjustment. Remediation: take absolute value and reprocess through price adjustment pipeline.
Escalate to Data Owner for manual review. Likely data entry error or unit mismatch.

Description: GEO_CODE must be a valid Canadian province/territory code.
Remediation_Action: Lookup correct GEO_CODE from Statistics Canada geographic reference table.

Description: DWELLING_TYPE must be one of 5 approved categories.
Remediation_Action: Map to nearest approved dwelling type using reference lookup table. Escalate if ambiguous.

Description: INTENDED_MARKET must be one of: Homeowner, Rental, Condominium.
Remediation_Action: Map to approved value using permit application reference data.
Reformat to YYYY-MM using date parsing. Reject if year or month is out of valid range.

Description: Each grain combination must be unique.
Remediation_Action: Identify source of duplicate load. Remove duplicate keeping most recent record. Investigate ETL pipeline.

Description: REF_DATE must not be after the current month.
Remediation_Action: Remove future-dated records. Investigate source system for clock/date errors.
Map to nearest valid status code. Blank (final) is default.
